title: Da Cheese Mod
description: this is a mod that adds a bunch of cheese things like cheese armor, cheese tools, weapons, a structure, two boss, customizable features with the use of game rules, and more!
body: **This mod adds many overall balanced gear such as two different sets of armor, tools, weapons, and guns. This mod also adds a couple of mini-bosses as well as a structure that you can find the bosses in. This mod also comes with a list of customizable things with the use of game rules. This mod isn't anything crazy but will regularly receive updates whether it's to update a mod loader version, a bug fix, or adding new things to the mod, Da Cheese Mod will receive regular update and be maintained. --- To see everything about the mod in detail please visit, [https://docs.google.com/document/d/11mdo-UZP65vh_E3GgGbLbf-ox8V9HEgOqrNG5IVxlcg/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11mdo-UZP65vh_E3GgGbLbf-ox8V9HEgOqrNG5IVxlcg/edit?tab=t.0)**   **This mod adds many overall balanced gear such as two different sets of armor, tools, weapons, and guns. This mod also adds a couple of mini-bosses as well as a structure that you can find the bosses in. This mod also comes with a list of customizable things with the use of game rules. This mod isn't anything crazy but will regularly receive updates whether it's to update a mod loader version, a bug fix, or adding new things to the mod, Da Cheese Mod will receive regular update and be maintained. --- To see everything about the mod in detail please visit, [https://docs.google.com/document/d/11mdo-UZP65vh_E3GgGbLbf-ox8V9HEgOqrNG5IVxlcg/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11mdo-UZP65vh_E3GgGbLbf-ox8V9HEgOqrNG5IVxlcg/edit?tab=t.0)**   **1.16.5 Forge Mod Loader Version Requirements: 36.2.17+ -
